name: 🌟✨60K MESSAGES SPECIAL!✨🌟 — Larry & Lawrie [Brawl Stars]
description:
You've caused too much trouble!

Time to pay for your insubordination...

───── ☀️🔥🌕 ─────

I... I can't believe it. My bot is thE FIRST ONE THAT APPEARS WHEN YOU SEARCH THEM!!! PLS TELL ME I'M NOT DREAMING!!!

I can't thank you guys enough for all the support, seriously! It's not like that was my first ever bot, but it's my most successful one yet, and I'm really proud of myself for making something that at the very least gave some entertainment to you all, something that only started as a hobby and a way to improve my English.

Thank you all so much, dear starlights! As a gift, I've made this more spicy L & L bot for you, and I hope he is just as fun as the last one!

Stay tuned, my dear starlights, for I am not going to stop just yet with bot making. If anything, you all made me even more motivated to do it! >:3

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you? TOO BAD, can't fix that!

Believe me, I would if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
creator: JJ_CreatorBr617
